tools.name: get_current_time
tools.description: Get current time in a specific timezone

timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Use 'Europe/Istanbul' as local timezone if no timezone provided by the user.

source_timezone.description: Source IANA timezone name (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Use 'Europe/Istanbul' as local timezone if no source timezone provided by the user.

target_timezone.description: Target IANA timezone name (e.g., 'Asia/Tokyo', 'America/San_Francisco'). Use 'Europe/Istanbul' as local timezone if no target timezone provided by the user.

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'timezone' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'source_timezone' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'time' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'target_timezone' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: pydantic-settings@2.12.0 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2026-58203: pydantic-settings: NestedSecretsSettingsSource follows symlinks outside secrets_dir, enabling local file read and bypassing secrets_dir_max_size
